title: GitHub - long66666/gemini-watermark-remover: Remove the visible Gemini / Nano Banana watermark from your own AI images — free, open source, runs 100% locally. Solves the alpha blend instead of inpainting, so the pixels under the mark come back exactly.
excerpt: Remove the visible Gemini / Nano Banana watermark from your own AI images — free, open source, runs 100% locally. Solves the alpha blend instead of inpainting, so the pixels under the mark come bac...
content_html:
Remove the Gemini ★ sparkle watermark from images you generated with Google Gemini or Nano Banana — entirely on your own machine. No uploads, no sign-up, no server. Works as a browser tool, a TypeScript library, and a CLI.

Look at the stars inside the sparkle's outline. They are back, not painted over — see how it works.

What this does — and doesn't. This removes the visible corner sparkle only. It does not touch SynthID or any other invisible provenance watermark, and it never will. Google itself already ships watermark-free images to AI Ultra subscribers; this gives you the same clean canvas for content you generated yourself.

Try it: geminiwatermarkwiper.com — same engine, running in your browser tab.

How it works

The mark is composited as a plain alpha blend:

observed = α · overlay + (1 − α) · original

That equation is invertible. If you know the overlay — its exact colour and its exact alpha, per pixel — the original comes back:

original = (observed − α · overlay) / (1 − α)

So the whole problem reduces to knowing the overlay, and it can be solved for exactly. Ask Gemini for a flat white image and a flat black one. Both come back carrying the same mark, over backgrounds you already know, which is two equations per pixel for two unknowns:

α = 1 − (obs_white − obs_black) / (bg_white − bg_black)
overlay = (obs_black − (1 − α) · bg_black) / α

The recovered mark peaks at 31% opacity and is nowhere near opaque, so the original pixels were never destroyed — they were only dimmed. Reversing the blend restores them outright. Nothing is inpainted, nothing is guessed at, and the stars that were under the sparkle come back exactly as they were.

The template lives in src/template-sparkle.ts; scripts/extract-template.mjs regenerates it if Google ever changes the mark.

Finding it

Google composites the mark at a fixed 48px, inset a fixed 96px from the right and bottom — the same absolute pixels in a 1024×1024 image and a 1408×768 one, not scaled to the frame.

Confirming the mark is there is the harder half, and most of the obvious approaches quietly fail. Matching on colour finds teal lakes. Correlating the template's shape against brightness is buried by gravel and fooled by any smooth gradient. And one unmarked photo has a grey rock sitting exactly where the sparkle would be, matching an overlay's brightness to within 5%, which defeats every test based on amplitude.

What works is to remove the overlay and ask whether it explained the pixels — specifically, what happens to the gradient energy along the mark's own silhouette, the ring where the template's alpha changes fastest and a composited edge would live:

  1. The outline must vanish. Subtracting a sparkle from something that isn't one manufactures edges instead of erasing them.
  2. What's left must look like the rest of the photo, judged against control patches beside it. The rock fails here: it isn't star-shaped, so cutting a star out of it leaves its edges standing.

Both gates are in src/detect.ts, with the measurements that set them.

Features

  • 100% local — images never leave your machine
  • Exact reconstruction, not inpainting: the pixels under the mark are recovered, not approximated
  • Says no when it means no — an image with no sparkle is returned untouched rather than scrubbed
  • Batch CLI for folders of images — PNG, JPG, WebP
  • Zero runtime dependencies in the core; sharp only for the CLI

Library usage

import { removeWatermark } from 'gemini-watermark-remover';

// imageData: ImageData from a canvas, or { width, height, data }
const result = removeWatermark(imageData);

if (result.mode === 'none') {
  // No sparkle found. The image is returned unchanged.
} else {
  ctx.putImageData(
    new ImageData(result.image.data, result.image.width, result.image.height),
    0,
    0,
  );
}

CLI

npx gemini-watermark-remover input.png              # writes input-clean.png
gwr *.png --suffix -nowm                            # batch
gwr shot.jpg -o clean.jpg --region 900,980,120,120  # override detection

Nano Banana watermark remover

Nano Banana is the community name for Gemini's image model — its images carry the same sparkle, so everything here applies unchanged.

Gemini video watermark remover

On the roadmap: the same template applied per-frame via WebCodecs. Watch the repo.

Known limits

  • Images carrying the large "Gemini" wordmark (a different, much bigger overlay) are not supported yet. They are detected as unsupported and left alone rather than half-erased. Extracting that template needs a flat white/black pair from the export path that produces it.
  • The mark is assumed to be at Google's standard placement. A cropped or resized image may need --region.

Use responsibly

Use this on content you generated yourself. Invisible provenance (SynthID) is deliberately left intact — this project is about a clean visual canvas, not about defeating AI-content detection.

License

MIT

sentences.en: Confirming the mark is there is the harder half, and most of the obvious approaches quietly fail.
sentences.zh: 确认标记是否存在是更难的一半，大多数明显的方法都会悄然失败。

sentences.en: Matching on colour finds teal lakes.
sentences.zh: 颜色匹配发现青色湖。

sentences.en: Correlating the template's shape against brightness is buried by gravel and fooled by any smooth gradient.
sentences.zh: 将模板的形状与亮度相关联会被砾石所掩盖，并会被任何平滑的渐变所愚弄。

sentences.en: And one unmarked photo has a grey rock sitting exactly where the sparkle would be, matching an overlay's brightness to within 5%, which defeats every test based on amplitude.
sentences.zh: 在一张未标记的照片中，一块灰色岩石恰好位于闪光所在的位置，与覆盖层的亮度匹配在 5% 以内，这击败了基于幅度的所有测试。

sentences.en: What works is to remove the overlay and ask whether it explained the pixels — specifically, what happens to the gradient energy along the mark's own silhouette, the ring where the template's alpha changes fastest and a composited edge would live:
sentences.zh: 有效的方法是删除覆盖层并询问它是否解释了像素 - 具体来说，沿着标记自身轮廓的梯度能量发生了什么，模板的 Alpha 变化最快的环以及合成边缘将存在：

blocks.html_en: • The outline must vanish. Subtracting a sparkle from something that isn't one manufactures edges instead of erasing them.

sentences.en: The outline must vanish.
sentences.zh: 轮廓必须消失。

sentences.en: Subtracting a sparkle from something that isn't one manufactures edges instead of erasing them.
sentences.zh: 从非事物中减去闪光会产生边缘，而不是擦除它们。

blocks.html_en: • What's left must look like the rest of the photo, judged against control patches beside it. The rock fails here: it isn't star-shaped, so cutting a star out of it leaves its edges standing.

sentences.en: What's left must look like the rest of the photo, judged against control patches beside it.
sentences.zh: 剩下的部分看起来必须与照片的其余部分相似，根据旁边的控制斑块进行判断。

sentences.en: The rock fails here: it isn't star-shaped, so cutting a star out of it leaves its edges standing.
sentences.zh: 这块岩石在这里失败了：它不是星形的，所以从上面切出一颗星形，它的边缘就会保持原状。

content_html_zh:
完全在您自己的机器上从使用 Google Gemini 或 Nano Banana 生成的图像中删除 Gemini ★ 闪光水印。 无需上传，无需注册，无需服务器。 用作浏览器工具、TypeScript 库和 CLI。

看看闪光轮廓内的星星。 它们又回来了，没有被涂掉——看看它是如何工作的。

这有什么作用，也没有什么作用。 这仅消除了可见的角闪光。 它不会触及 SynthID 或任何其他不可见的出处水印，而且永远不会。 谷歌本身已经向 AI Ultra 订阅者提供无水印图像；这为您自己生成的内容提供了同样干净的画布。

尝试一下：geminiwatermarkwiper.com — 相同的引擎，在浏览器选项卡中运行。

它是如何运作的

该标记被合成为纯 alpha 混合：

observed = α · overlay + (1 − α) · original

该方程是可逆的。 如果您知道叠加层（每个像素的确切颜色和 alpha），则原始结果会返回：

original = (observed − α · overlay) / (1 − α)

因此，整个问题归结为了解覆盖层，并且可以准确地解决它。 向 Gemini 索要一张纯白色图像和一张纯黑色图像。 两者都带有相同的标记，在您已经知道的背景上，这是每个像素对于两个未知数的两个方程：

α = 1 − (obs_white − obs_black) / (bg_white − bg_black)
overlay = (obs_black − (1 − α) · bg_black) / α

恢复的标记的不透明度达到峰值 31%，远非不透明，因此原始像素从未被破坏——它们只是变暗了。 颠倒混合即可完全恢复它们。 没有任何东西被修补，没有任何东西被猜测，闪闪发光下的星星又恢复了原来的样子。

模板位于 src/template-sparkle.ts 中；如果 Google 更改了标记，scripts/extract-template.mjs 会重新生成它。

找到它

Google 以固定的 48 像素合成标记，从右侧和底部插入固定的 96 像素 - 1024×1024 图像和 1408×768 图像中的绝对像素相同，未缩放到框架。

确认标记是否存在是更难的一半，大多数明显的方法都会悄然失败。 颜色匹配发现青色湖。 将模板的形状与亮度相关联会被砾石所掩盖，并会被任何平滑的渐变所愚弄。 在一张未标记的照片中，一块灰色岩石恰好位于闪光所在的位置，与覆盖层的亮度匹配在 5% 以内，这击败了基于幅度的所有测试。

有效的方法是删除覆盖层并询问它是否解释了像素 - 具体来说，沿着标记自身轮廓的梯度能量发生了什么，模板的 Alpha 变化最快的环以及合成边缘将存在：

  1. 轮廓必须消失。 从非事物中减去闪光会产生边缘，而不是擦除它们。
  2. 剩下的部分看起来必须与照片的其余部分相似，根据旁边的控制斑块进行判断。 这块岩石在这里失败了：它不是星形的，所以从上面切出一颗星形，它的边缘就会保持原状。

两个门都在 src/detect.ts 中，并带有设置它们的测量值。

特征

  • 100% 本地 — 图像永远不会离开您的机器
  • 精确重建，而不是修复：标记下的像素被恢复，而不是近似
  • 说不就说不——没有闪光的图像会原封不动地返回，而不是被擦掉
  • 用于图像文件夹的批处理 CLI — PNG、JPG、WebP
  • 核心中的零运行时依赖；锐利仅适用于 CLI

库的使用

import { removeWatermark } from 'gemini-watermark-remover';

// imageData: ImageData from a canvas, or { width, height, data }
const result = removeWatermark(imageData);

if (result.mode === 'none') {
  // No sparkle found. The image is returned unchanged.
} else {
  ctx.putImageData(
    new ImageData(result.image.data, result.image.width, result.image.height),
    0,
    0,
  );
}

CLI

npx gemini-watermark-remover input.png              # writes input-clean.png
gwr *.png --suffix -nowm                            # batch
gwr shot.jpg -o clean.jpg --region 900,980,120,120  # override detection

纳米香蕉水印去除剂

Nano Banana 是 Gemini 图像模型的社区名称 - 它的图像具有相同的闪光，因此这里的一切都保持不变。

双子座视频水印去除器

在路线图上：通过 WebCodecs 对每帧应用相同的模板。 观看回购协议。

已知限制

  • 尚不支持带有大“Gemini”文字标记（不同的、更大的覆盖层）的图像。 它们被检测为不受支持并被单独保留而不是被半擦除。 提取该模板需要从生成它的导出路径中获取一对纯白色/黑色。
  • 假定该标记位于 Google 的标准位置。 裁剪或调整大小的图像可能需要 --region。

负责任地使用

将其用于您自己生成的内容。 隐形来源（SynthID）故意保持原样——这个项目是关于一个干净的视觉画布，而不是关于击败人工智能内容检测。
